next_action: Design approved. Proceed to phase-2-policy-revision implementation, preserving the A/B path choice, B1 pre-push bypass disclosure, post-push CI green gate before R1, and document-only scope.

observations.detail: Non-blocking cleanup: 02-plan.md still retains the historical Phase 1 PR-default plan before the new Phase 2 override. The Phase 2 section is explicit enough to govern the current revision, but marking Phase 1 as historical or superseded would reduce reread friction.
